dataset_provenance.tree_source: IQ-TREE GTR+G fast-search trees inferred from the 334-taxon trimmed publication MSA across 750 bp windows.
dataset_provenance.citation: Sakalli, E. B., Haendeler, S. E., von Haeseler, A., and Schmidt, H. A. (2026). Animating Phylogenetic Trees from Sliding-Window Analyses. bioRxiv. doi:10.64898/2026.04.01.715821
